relationships.context: Weekly review resurfaces important topics from this tracking system
Strategic Partner performs additional actions when conversation-end runs
Finalizes session synthesis if not already done
Stages any pending updates to pending-updates/
Updates with unresolved items from the session
Updates personal intelligence through autonomous learning
Personal intelligence is stored at this location
